title: Cosmic Adventures: A Journey Through Space!

style_guide.art_style: Whimsical, detailed watercolor and ink illustrations with soft edges and textured paper background
style_guide.color_palette: Deep cerulean blue, burning orange, golden yellow, forest green, warm white, charcoal gray
style_guide.lighting: Soft, diffused starlight and sunlight, creating gentle contrasts and cozy glows

characters.name: Leo
characters.description: Small build, dark skin, curly black hair, bright green eyes. Wears a bulky white astronaut suit with blue piping, orange accents, an 'Astro-Explorer' patch, and a large clear helmet with a microphone.

characters.name: Mia
characters.description: Medium build, light skin, short fiery orange hair in a bob, blue eyes. Wears a bulky white astronaut suit with blue piping, yellow accents, an 'Astro-Explorer' patch, and a large clear helmet with a microphone.

pages.narration: Blast off! Welcome to the mission of a lifetime! We've escaped Earth's gravity and are zooming through space! Did you know the Karman Line, about 62 miles up, marks the beginning of space? We're on our way to learn incredible things! Are you ready for an adventure?
pages.image_prompt: Whimsical watercolor and ink illustrations style. Leo (dark skin, curly black hair, bright green eyes, bulky white astronaut suit with blue piping, orange accents) and Mia (light skin, short fiery orange bob, blue eyes, bulky white astronaut suit with blue piping, yellow accents) float weightlessly inside their starship cockpit, gazing wide-eyed out a large window at a glowing Earth. Control panels, wires, and tools surround them in the cozy, functional space. Full bleed illustration, scene fills the entire frame edge to edge, no borders, no white margins, no frames, no vignette.

visual.setting: Inside a cozy, functional starship cockpit in low Earth orbit
visual.action: Floating weightlessly and observing Earth through a window
visual.time_of_day: Early morning in space (Earth sunrise visible)

pages.narration: Look out! Our next stop is the "Red Planet," Mars! Look at that rusty-looking dust! It's actually iron oxide, just like on rusty metal! Mars has huge volcanoes, including Olympus Mons, which is three times taller than Mount Everest! Imagine hiking that!
pages.image_prompt: Whimsical watercolor and ink illustrations style. Leo (dark skin, curly black hair, bright green eyes, bulky white astronaut suit with blue piping, orange accents) and Mia (light skin, short fiery orange bob, blue eyes, bulky white astronaut suit with blue piping, yellow accents) bounce along the dusty orange surface of Mars, leaving footprints. Their bulky suits make them look playful against the desolate, cratered landscape under a dark sky with a hint of pink. Their starship 'Galactic Explorer' is parked nearby. Full bleed illustration, scene fills the entire frame edge to edge, no borders, no white margins, no frames, no vignette.

visual.setting: Dusty orange, rocky surface of Mars, desolate crater landscape
visual.action: Bouncing along the Martian surface and observing the environment

pages.narration: Oh my gosh! Look at that *giant* storm! We are approaching Jupiter, the largest planet in our solar system! The Great Red Spot is a monstrous storm bigger than Earth that has been raging for hundreds of years! Its powerful gravity pulls on us already!
pages.image_prompt: Whimsical watercolor and ink illustrations style. Leo (dark skin, curly black hair, bright green eyes, bulky white astronaut suit with blue piping, orange accents) and Mia (light skin, short fiery orange bob, blue eyes, bulky white astronaut suit with blue piping, yellow accents) are strapped into their seats, gripping controls, as their starship navigates close to the swirling bands of Jupiter. A massive swirling red storm, the Great Red Spot, fills the viewport, looking like an angry, colorful eye in the distance. The scene is dramatic and intense. Full bleed illustration, scene fills the entire frame edge to edge, no borders, no white margins, no frames, no vignette.

visual.setting: Approaching the colorful, turbulent atmosphere of Jupiter
visual.action: Navigating close to Jupiter's Great Red Spot storm

choice.question: Do you want to brave the winds or watch from a safe distance?

option_a.label: Navigate closer to the giant storm

pages.narration: Wow! The winds are *roaring* outside! As we get closer, we can see the true scale of this incredible cyclone! Scientists believe the Great Red Spot's winds reach speeds of up to 432 miles per hour, faster than any hurricane on Earth! Its powerful winds churn and swirl everything in its path!
pages.image_prompt: Whimsical watercolor and ink illustrations style. Leo (dark skin, curly black hair, bright green eyes, bulky white astronaut suit with blue piping, orange accents) and Mia (light skin, short fiery orange bob, blue eyes, bulky white astronaut suit with blue piping, yellow accents) cling tightly to internal handrails as the ship shudders violently. Swirling orange, red, and white cloud formations rush past the viewport, stretching the paint lines to show speed and power. The cockpit lights flicker with excitement. Full bleed illustration, scene fills the entire frame edge to edge, no borders, no white margins, no frames, no vignette.

visual.setting: The turbulent, swirling clouds within Jupiter's Great Red Spot
visual.action: Clinging to the ship as it shudders through intense winds

pages.narration: Phew! We made it through the outer layers! Did you know Jupiter has over 80 moons?! We're now heading past Io, the most volcanically active moon, and Europa, which has a salty ocean under its icy crust! Maybe some scientists are searching for life there!
pages.image_prompt: Whimsical watercolor and ink illustrations style. Leo (dark skin, curly black hair, bright green eyes, bulky white astronaut suit with blue piping, orange accents) and Mia (light skin, short fiery orange bob, blue eyes, bulky white astronaut suit with blue piping, yellow accents) look relaxed and relieved. They're back at their window, pointing excitedly at Io, a yellow-orange moon spewing plumes of dust, and Europa, a smooth, white, and cracked icy world. The starship glides peacefully. Full bleed illustration, scene fills the entire frame edge to edge, no borders, no white margins, no frames, no vignette.

visual.setting: Gliding peacefully past Io and Europa moons near Jupiter
visual.action: Observing distinct moons and volcanic plumes

pages.narration: Look at all those space rocks! Instead of diving into Jupiter's storm, we've steered towards the vast asteroid belt that lies between Mars and Jupiter! This huge collection of rocky bodies orbits the Sun, just like the planets! Some asteroids are as big as a dwarf planet, while others are small dust motes!
pages.image_prompt: Whimsical watercolor and ink illustrations style. Leo (dark skin, curly black hair, bright green eyes, bulky white astronaut suit with blue piping, orange accents) and Mia (light skin, short fiery orange bob, blue eyes, bulky white astronaut suit with blue piping, yellow accents) navigate their starship carefully through a field of variously shaped asteroids. They look focused, avoiding collisions. Large, irregularly shaped rocks with craters zoom past the viewpoint against the starry background. The setting sun catches the edges of the rocks. Full bleed illustration, scene fills the entire frame edge to edge, no borders, no white margins, no frames, no vignette.

visual.setting: Navigating through a dense field of asteroids in deep space

pages.narration: Wow! We even found some "dwarf planets" here! Ceres is the largest object in the asteroid belt and is classified as a dwarf planet! We also caught a glimpse of a comet's tail! Did you know a comet's tail is made of gas and dust pushed by the solar wind, always pointing away from the Sun?
pages.image_prompt: Whimsical watercolor and ink illustrations style. Leo (dark skin, curly black hair, bright green eyes, bulky white astronaut suit with blue piping, orange accents) and Mia (light skin, short fiery orange bob, blue eyes, bulky white astronaut suit with blue piping, yellow accents) point to a distant spherical object (Ceres) and watch a comet's long, glowing tail stretch across the cosmos. The starship looks small against the celestial scale. The background stars are bright and numerous. Full bleed illustration, scene fills the entire frame edge to edge, no borders, no white margins, no frames, no vignette.

visual.setting: Deep space viewing a dwarf planet and a distant comet
visual.action: Observing celestial objects and a glowing comet trail

pages.narration: It's time to head home! We've learned so much about the universe, from vast storms to ancient rocks! Remember to keep looking up and wondering! Space is full of endless secrets just waiting to be explored by curious minds like yours!
pages.image_prompt: Whimsical watercolor and ink illustrations style. Leo (dark skin, curly black hair, bright green eyes, bulky white astronaut suit with blue piping, orange accents) and Mia (light skin, short fiery orange bob, blue eyes, bulky white astronaut suit with blue piping, yellow accents) smile as they sit in their cockpit, watching Earth grow larger and brighter in the viewport. The control panel lights glow softly, indicating their safe journey back. Stars fill the rest of the window. Full bleed illustration, scene fills the entire frame edge to edge, no borders, no white margins, no frames, no vignette.

visual.setting: Inside the cozy starship cockpit returning to Earth orbit
visual.action: Watching Earth approach and feeling happy
visual.time_of_day: Evening in space (Earth city lights visible)
